evals.description: Triggers on request to build a social media strategy
evals.prompt: Help me build a social media strategy for my B2B SaaS startup
I want to post the same content on LinkedIn and Instagram to save time. Is that okay?

evals.description: Can write a LinkedIn post in the correct format
evals.prompt: Write a LinkedIn post about the importance of async communication for remote teams

evals.description: Can write an X (Twitter) thread in the correct format
evals.prompt: Write a Twitter thread explaining why most content calendars fail

evals.description: Can create a weekly content calendar with pillar structure
evals.prompt: Create a one-week content calendar for an indie developer building a project management tool
My followers are dropping off. I've been posting product updates and sales promotions every day. What am I doing wrong?
My Instagram posts are getting 2.5% engagement rate. Is that good or bad?

evals.description: Provides crisis communication guidance in correct order
evals.prompt: A viral tweet is falsely claiming our product caused data loss. We have 200 angry replies. What do we do?
Should I post 3 times a day to grow faster or post less frequently but more consistently?
Should I use all 30 hashtags on every Instagram post to maximize reach?

evals.description: Guides metrics analysis toward signal metrics not vanity metrics
evals.prompt: We hit 100,000 impressions last month. Is our social media strategy working?

evals.description: Does not trigger for paid social advertising setup
evals.prompt: Set up a Facebook Ads campaign with a $500 budget targeting 25-35 year olds interested in fitness
